'''''Bravado III''''' was a [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in [[Kathol Republic Navy]].

==History==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Bravado III'' was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Willa Udine]]. It was [[Battle of Episol|attacked]] by the ''[[Lialic II]]'' commanded by [[Rolf Treidum]], masquerading as a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ship. The ''Bravado III'' was running with a skeleton crew, not including any troops, and only forty survived the attack. The modified New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' offered assistance, but Captain Udine assumed they were hostile due to the Imperial ruse. Udine sent a coded message to her forces, and ''FarStar'' was intercepted by ''[[Juno II]]'', ''[[Mirandine]]'', ''[[Quillion]]'', ''[[Siroma]]'', [[Solidarity (Marauder-class)|''Solidarity'']], and [[Triumph (Marauder-class)|''Triumph'']], which were all similar ''Marauder''-class ships. The Kathol Republic ships escorted the ''FarStar'' to [[Dayark]] and impounded it.

==Appearances==
